# agent-loop-guard

> Framework-agnostic agent loop detection ‚Äî sliding window similarity scoring to catch stuck agents.

`pip install agent-loop-guard` | Python >=3.9 | zero dependencies

## API

### LoopGuard(window_size=10, similarity_threshold=0.85, action_config=ActionConfig())

Main detector. Runs 4 strategies per check, returns highest-confidence result.

| param | type | default | description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| window_size | int | 10 | sliding window size for strategy histories |
| similarity_threshold | float | 0.85 | min similarity for fuzzy/stagnation detection |
| action_config | ActionConfig | ActionConfig() | escalation thresholds |

Methods:
- `.check(tool: str, args: dict|str|None=None, output: str|None=None) -> Decision` ‚Äî check one action for loop patterns. Pass `output` to enable stagnation detection.
- `.reset() -> None` ‚Äî clear all state for reuse across tasks.
- `.step_count -> int` ‚Äî total actions checked (property).
- `.consecutive_hits -> int` ‚Äî current streak of detections with confidence > 0.3 (property).

### Action (Enum)

`CONTINUE` | `WARN` | `STOP` | `ESCALATE`

### Decision(action, reason="", strategy="", confidence=0.0, step_number=0)

Frozen dataclass from `check()`.

| field | type | description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| action | Action | recommended action |
| reason | str | e.g. "Exact repeat: 'search' repeated 4 times" |
| strategy | str | `exact_repeat` / `fuzzy_repeat` / `cycle_detection` / `output_stagnation` / `""` |
| confidence | float | 0.0‚Äì1.0 |
| step_number | int | sequential action number |

Properties: `.is_loop -> bool` (STOP or ESCALATE), `.should_warn -> bool` (WARN)

### ActionConfig(warn_threshold=2, stop_threshold=4, escalate_threshold=6, reflection_message="...")

Maps consecutive hit count ‚Üí Action. Method: `.resolve_action(hits: int) -> Action`

### ActionRecord(tool: str, args=None, output=None, step=0)

Single action in strategy histories.

### LoopGuardCallback(guard=None, on_warn=None, on_stop=None, on_escalate=None, **guard_kwargs)

`from loop_guard.integrations.generic import LoopGuardCallback`

Callback adapter for any agent framework.
- `.before_tool_call(tool, args=None, output=None) -> Decision` ‚Äî check + dispatch callbacks.
- `.reset()` ‚Äî reset underlying guard.

## Detection Strategies

| strategy | detects | confidence formula |
|----------|---------|-------------------|
| ExactRepeat | identical (tool, args) pairs | consecutive_count / window_size |
| FuzzyRepeat | near-identical args (Jaccard + edit distance ‚â• threshold) | high_sim_count / (window_size - 1) |
| CycleDetection | repeating sequences A‚ÜíB‚ÜíC‚ÜíA‚ÜíB‚ÜíC (length 2‚Äì5) | repetitions / (min_reps + 2) |
| OutputStagnation | same tool returning similar outputs (‚â• threshold) | stagnant_count / (same_tool_outputs - 1) |

Confidence > 0.3 increments consecutive_hits; else resets to 0.

## Similarity Functions

`from loop_guard.similarity import ...`

- `jaccard_similarity(a: set, b: set) -> float` ‚Äî |a‚à©b| / |a‚à™b|
- `token_jaccard(s1, s2) -> float` ‚Äî Jaccard on whitespace tokens
- `edit_similarity(s1, s2) -> float` ‚Äî 1 - normalized Levenshtein (O(min(m,n)) space)
- `args_similarity(args1, args2) -> float` ‚Äî 50% Jaccard + 50% edit (Jaccard only if > 2000 chars)

Args normalization: None‚Üí"", str‚Üías-is, dict‚Üísorted "k=v" pairs, else‚Üístr().

## Examples

```python
# Basic
from loop_guard import LoopGuard, Action
guard = LoopGuard()
for action in agent_actions:
    d = guard.check(action.tool, action.args, action.output)
    if d.action == Action.STOP: break

# Custom thresholds
from loop_guard import ActionConfig
guard = LoopGuard(window_size=15, similarity_threshold=0.80,
                  action_config=ActionConfig(warn_threshold=3, stop_threshold=5))

# Callback integration
from loop_guard.integrations.generic import LoopGuardCallback
cb = LoopGuardCallback(on_warn=lambda d: print(d.reason),
                       on_stop=lambda d: raise_stop(d))
for call in agent.run():
    cb.before_tool_call(call.name, call.args, call.result)
```

[Docs](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/agent-loop-guard) | [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/agent-loop-guard/) | [Source](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/agent-loop-guard)
